Argument.Name: URL or input file
Argument.Description: URL or file path to OpenAPI Specification file

Option.Description: Add additional namespace to generated types
Use cancellation tokens
Don't generate contract types
Set the accessibility of the generated types to 'internal'
Force to keep matching schema, uses regular expressions. Use together with "--trim-unused-schema". Can be set multiple times.
Only include Paths that match the provided regular expression. May be set multiple times.
Generate a Refit interface for each endpoint. May be one of ByEndpoint, ByTag
Default namespace to use for generated types
Don't add <Accept> header to output file
Don't add <auto-generated> header to output file
Don't show donation banner
Don't generate deprecated operations
Don't log errors or collect telemetry
Don't generate operation headers

The NSwag IOperationNameGenerator implementation to use. May be one of: - Default - MultipleClientsFromOperationId - MultipleClientsFromPathSegments - MultipleClientsFromFirstTagAndOperationId - MultipleClientsFromFirstTagAndOperationName - MultipleClientsFromFirstTagAndPathSegments - SingleClientFromOperationId - SingleClientFromPathSegments See https://refitter.github.io/api/Refitter.Core.OperationNameGeneratorTypes.html for more information.
Generate operation names using pattern. When using --multiple-interfaces ByEndpoint, this is name of the Execute() method in the interface.
Generate nullable parameters as optional parameters
Path to Output file
Path to .refitter settings file. Specifying this will ignore all other settings (except for --output)
Set to true to skip default additional properties
Skip validation of the OpenAPI specification
Only include Endpoints that contain this tag. May be set multiple times and result in OR'ed evaluation.
Removes unreferenced components schema to keep the generated output to a minimum
Return Task<IApiResponse<T>> instead of Task<T>
Explicitly format date query string parameters in ISO 8601 standard date format using delimiters (2023-06-15)
